name: Missing Validation of OpenSSL Certificate
description: The product uses OpenSSL to establish SSL/TLS connections but fails to call SSL_get_verify_result() to validate the server certificate. This allows attackers to present invalid, expired, or mismatched certificates to impersonate trusted hosts via man-in-the-middle attacks.
detection_pattern: EXTERNAL(ssl_connection) node establishes a connection via OpenSSL but the data flow proceeds to INGRESS or EGRESS without passing through an AUTH(certificate_validation) node that calls SSL_get_verify_result(). The trust chain is assumed without verification.
